pool.baseline: it's just hard to see the point of any of this lately. like, we're just tiny specks on a rock that's eventually going to be swallowed by the sun, and then even the sun dies. everything we do, every struggle, every feeling... it just evaporates. it feels pretty pointless when you really look at the scale of it all.

pool.baseline: i just don't see the point anymore. everything i worked for in the lab... the last three years... just gone. the funding was pulled and my advisor won't even look me in the eye. i feel like i've spent my whole life building a version of myself that doesn't even exist if i'm not a researcher. i am just so incredibly tired of fighting for something that clearly doesn't want me.

pool.baseline: The moon is a cold, unfeeling eye tonight, and my heart... it feels as though it has finally shattered beyond repair. To be so loved, and then to be cast aside like refuse in the gutter... it is a cruelty I cannot endure. I find myself longing for the shadows, to simply drift into the dark and let the silence claim me. There is a certain... stillness in the thought of never waking again.
